procedure_name.description: Name of the treatment or procedure (e.g. Botox, Dysport, Juvederm, Microneedling, HydraFacial, Laser Hair Removal, CoolSculpting, Chemical Peel, IV Therapy, B12 Injection, Sculptra, Kybella, PRP, Lip Filler, Dermaplaning)

brand.description: Brand name if specified (e.g. Botox, Dysport, Xeomin, Jeuveau, Daxxify, Juvederm, Restylane, Sculptra)

price.description: Numeric price value only, no $ sign

pricing_unit.description: per_unit for neurotoxins priced by unit, per_syringe for fillers, per_session for most treatments, per_cycle for CoolSculpting

is_starting_price.description: True if price says 'starting at', 'from $', or 'as low as'

notes.description: Any relevant context like 'per area', 'per treatment area', 'package of 3', etc

has_price_menu.description: True if the page has any pricing information at all

extract.systemPrompt: You are extracting pricing data from medical spa and aesthetic clinic websites. Extract all treatment prices you can find. Focus on: neurotoxins (Botox, Dysport, Xeomin, Jeuveau, Daxxify), dermal fillers (Juvederm, Restylane, Sculptra, Radiesse, Kybella), and aesthetic treatments (microneedling, HydraFacial, chemical peels, laser hair removal, CoolSculpting, IPL/BBL, PRP, IV therapy, B12 injections, weight loss injections). If no prices are visible on this page, return has_price_menu: false.
